features: PROPERLY CLEANSE THE SKIN: this Hyaluronic Acid with Chamomile cleansing wipes not only removes makeup; more effectively it completely rid the skin of nastiness from excess oils and bacteria to pollution and impurities. Our cleansing wipes also remove any dead cells that have collected on the surface of the skin, making it easier for any subsequent topical products to penetrate the skin.

BRIGHTENS AND SMOOTHES THE SKIN: the impressive daily exfoliating benefits of using Hyaluronic Acid with Chamomile cleansing wipes is that it has the ability to give the skin an amazing natural complexion perfection by removing dead cells and debris that dulls the skin, it also create a healthy, glowing complexion without the use of harsh ingredients plus the buffing motion that goes hand in hand with their application smoothens any rough texture and softens dry skin.
MILDLY EXFOLIATE THE SKIN: Hyaluronic Acid with Chamomile cleansing wipes, lightly buff away the top layer of dead cells without irritating the skin which makes them ideal for daily exfoliation.
description: Product Description For quick and convenient skincare, try these Hyaluronic acid & Chamomile Face Wipes from Nuagé. Suitable for all skin types, use on the face and lips to lift and wipe away dirt and grease, leaving skin glowing and fresh. A great make-up remover, the chamomile acts to soothe any redness, making these wipes the perfect option for those who struggle with greasy and blemished skin. Why not follow with a Nuagé Hyaluronic Acid Face Mask to give your skin the deep clean and care it deserves? 30 x facial wipes Include chamomile For deep hydration Cleanses, tones, and refreshes skin Directions Use on the face and lips to lift and wipe away dirt and grease, leaving skin glowing and fresh. Safety Warning Caution: May cause skin irritation if used improperly. Please do not use the cloths near open flames. Please dispose of the used cloths environmentally friendly and not in the toilet. See more
